title: Stichorkis viridicallus
taxonomy: Stichorkis viridicallus is classified within the family Orchidaceae. This species belongs to the genus Stichorkis, which is a part of the subtribe Malaxideae. The subtribe Malaxideae is further classified within the tribe Malaxideae and the subfamily Orchidoideae. The family Orchidaceae is a large and diverse group of flowering plants commonly known as orchids. The classification of Stichorkis viridicallus reflects its evolutionary relationships with other orchid species.
